field_values.action_summary: The deadly scent takes effect. Dorothy and Toto fall into a deep sleep. The Cowardly Lion, unable to be easily moved by the others, also succumbs to the poppies and falls asleep.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups of Dorothy's eyes closing; Slow-motion shots of Toto falling asleep; Wide shot showing the Lion collapsing heavily into flowers; Medium shots of Scarecrow and Tin Woodman realizing danger
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Physical positioning of sleeping characters relative to one another
Graduated levels of sleepiness expressed through movement/muscle tension
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH008_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the lethal environmental hazard of the scarlet poppy meadow through the physical collapse of key characters. The sequence must transition from a peaceful, heavy atmosphere to high-stakes urgency as the non-affected characters realize their companions are incapacitated.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion

## Required Environments
- scarlet_poppy_meadow

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical positioning of sleeping characters relative to one another
- Graduated levels of sleepiness expressed through movement/muscle tension

## Beat List
- BT001: Dorothy and Toto succumb to the scent
- BT002: The Lion's heavy collapse
- BT003: Realization of danger
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
